title: Appendix A — Draft: Data Documentation
text:
For the exploration of the scenario “London Bridge is Falling Down”, the data set consulted will be pulled from the United States Department of Transit’s National Bridge Inventory. Not every variable in the data set will be included or transformed into a different variable. The data will pertain only to Douglas County in Nebraska, filtered with the known state and county codes. “National Bridge Inventory” (n.d.)

B National Bridge Inventory Data










Name
Data Name
Data Type
Range
Description




State Code
STATE_CODE_001
Integer
1-72
Code belonging to which state the bridge belongs to


Record Type
RECORD_TYPE_005A
Character
1-2Z
Designation of what type of record, with 1 referring to traffic that is on the bridge and 2 referring to underneath the bridge with letters depicting different areas


County Code
COUNTY_CODE_003
Integer
1-185
3 digit FIPS code belonging to the county the bridge is located in


Year Built
YEAR_BUILT_027
Integer
1888-2025
Integer corresponding to what year the bridge was built


Lanes On the Structure
TRAFFIC_LANES_ON_028A
Integer
1-12
Number of lanes on the structure


Lanes Under the Structure
TRAFFIC_LANES_UND_028B
Integer
0-17
Number of lanes under the structure


Average Daily Traffic
ADT_029
Integer
0-6425
Number of average daily traffic for the area of


Year of Average Daily Traffic
YEAR_ADT_030
Integer
1988-2025
Year recorded corresponding to when the average daily traffic was recorded


Structure Open, Posted, or Closed to Traffic
OPEN_CLOSED_POSTED_041
Character
A-K
Single letter denoting the traffic status of the bridge: A: open, B,D,E: open with stipulations, G: new structure not open yet, K: closed to all traffic, P,R: Posted


Is Above a Waterway
IS_ABOVE_WATERWAY
Integer
0,1
Determined through the Type of Service variable in the original National Bridge Inventory data set, which are indicated as above a waterway with the codes 5-9


Length of Maximum Span
MAX_SPAN_LEN_MT_048
Numeric
0-190.2
Length in meters of the maximum span of the bridge


Structure Length
STRUCTURE_LEN_MT_049
Numeric
6.1-1646.5
Length of the bridge in meters


Bridge Roadway Width, Curb-to-Curb
ROADWAY_WIDTH_MT_051
Numeric
0-69.7
Minimum width of the roadway on the bridge from the curb railing, or other restrictive measure, exclusive of flared areas for ramps


Deck Width, Out-to-Out
DECK_WIDTH_MT_052
Numeric
0-234.1
Out-to-out width of the bridge in meters, exclusive of flared areas for ramps


Minimum Vertical Clearance Over Bridge Roadway
VERT_CLR_OVER_MT_053
Numeric
3.96-99.99
Minimum vertical clearance in meters over the bridge roadway, including shoulders, to any superstructure restriction


Deck Condition Rating
DECK_COND_058
Character
N, 0-9
Condition of the deck of the bridge on a scale of 0-9 with 0 being failed condition and 9 being excellent condition


Superstructure Condition Rating
SUPERSTRUCTURE_COND_059
Character
N, 0-9
Condition of the superstructure of the bridge on a scale of 0-9 with 0 being failed condition and 9 being excellent condition


Substructure Condition Rating
SUBSTRUCTURE_COND_060
Character
N, 0-9
Condition of the substructure of the bridge on a scale of 0-9 with 0 being failed condition and 9 being excellent condition


Longitude
LONGDD
Numeric
-174.1823-0
Latitudinal coordinate of where the bridge is located


Latitude
LATDD
Numeric
0-70.21645
Longitudinal coordinate of where the bridge is located







“National Bridge Inventory.” n.d. Accessed April 22, 2026. https://geodata.bts.gov/datasets/usdot::national-bridge-inventory/about.
